title: oldenlandia quinquenervia
intro: Oldenlandia quinquenervia, also known as five-nerved oldenlandia or five-veined oldenlandia, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae that is native to tropical Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Oldenlandia quinquenervia include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Oldenlandia quinquenervia is often used in teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it can also be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
